result.stdout:
USAGE:
    mdu [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    add-breadcrumb-navigation    adds breadcrumb navigation to all matching     
                                 markdown files.                                
                                 Alias: abn                                     
    lint                         Runs the Linter and prints the results         
    print-tree                   Prints the detected markdown files as tree to  
                                 stdout                                         
    render                       Renders all Markdown files to the given output 
                                 path

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    mdu [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    add-breadcrumb-navigation    adds breadcrumb navigation to all matching     
                                 markdown files.                                
                                 Alias: abn                                     
    lint                         Runs the Linter and prints the results         
    print-tree                   Prints the detected markdown files as tree to  
                                 stdout                                         
    render                       Renders all Markdown files to the given output 
                                 path

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    mdu add-breadcrumb-navigation [PATH] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [PATH]    Root/Home Path for the Index

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information
    -p, --pattern <PATTERN>                           
        --hidden

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    mdu render [PATH] [OUTPATH] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [PATH]       Root/Home Path for the Index                                   
    [OUTPATH]    Path to the output folder where the rendered files will be     
                 saved                                                          

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information                         
    -p, --pattern <PATTERN>                                                    
        --hidden                                                               
        --editPageRoot         URL to the root url for editing the source files

commands.payload:

                 saved                                                          

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information                         
    -p, --pattern <PATTERN>                                                    
        --hidden                                                               
        --editPageRoot         URL to the root url for editing the source files
